chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of the Apostate

text: 5712 - رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ أَبِي وَلاَّدٍ اَلْحَنَّاطِ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ اِرْتَدَّ عَنِ اَلْإِسْلاَمِ لِمَنْ يَكُونُ مِيرَاثُهُ قَالَ "يُقْسَمُ مِيرَاثُهُ عَلَى وَرَثَتِهِ عَلَى كِتَابِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5712 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abu Walad Al-Hannat who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who apostatized from Islam. To whom does his inheritance go?
Imam (as) said: "His inheritance is divided among his heirs according to the Book of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic."
